description_text: DESCRIPTION PAYMENT SHIPPING RETURN POLICY CONTACT US Hot Item 4 PCS Chrome Door Handle Cover For 02 03 04 05 06 07 Jeep Liberty Replacement US USD 23.99 For 2002-2008 Dodge Ram 1500/2500/3500 Handle lever Cover Trim Bezel Accessories USD 24.99 For BMW X5 F15 2014-2018 Passenger Right Inner Door Handle Pull Trim Cover 1 PCS USD 16.99 FITS 2005-2015 NISSAN ARMADA LEFT DRIVER DOOR HANDLE KEY BEZEL COVER 80647-ZC00A USD 11.99 1 For Kia Forte Cerato 2014-2018 Exterior Door Handle Front Right Passenger Side USD 17.99 New List Item Exterior Door Handle Fits Mazda B2300 B2500 B3000 B4000 Front Left Or Right Side USD 11.99 Exterior Door Handle Front Left Right LH+RH for Hyundai Accent 06 07 08 09 10 11 USD 22.99 Chrome Outside Door Handle for 2004-10 Toyota Sienna Rear Left Right Replace Kit USD 21.99 Front Driver Side Door Handle Fits 05-06 Mazda Tribute Ford Focus ZX4 ZX4 ST ZXW USD 17.99 Set of 4 Outside Door Handle Front Rear & for 03-07 Nissan Rogue Murano Infiniti USD 40.99 Set of 4 For 07-14 Chevy Silverado Tahoe Exterior Outside Door Handle Front Rear Fitment: For Chevy | 2007-2013 Chevy Silverado 2007-2014 Chevy Silverado Tahoe For GMC | 2007-2013 GMC Sierra 1500 2007-2014 GMC Sierra 2500HD 3500HD GMC Yukon Descriptions: Set Of 4 Door Handle Covers With Keyhole These are stick-on overlays which will place on top of the existing door handle cover, not direct door cover replacements. Features: Match OEM chrome perfectly Come with 3M self-adhesive tape at the back Made of high quality ABS hard plastic with triple chrome plating Water and scratch resistant Easy to install (just peel and stick! - remember to align first) No drilling and cutting required Please note: Before applying, please make sure the original door handles are smooth, clean, dry, and free of wax, dirt and oil Package Include: 4X Door Handle Covers With Keyhole Item Specifics Brand : AUXITO Type : Door Handle Number of Pieces : 4 Placement on Vehicle : Front ,Left Right Rear Left Right Features : Easy Installation Manufacturer Part Number : BHM-YSJ-68855 Application : Exterior Outside Fitment Type : Direct Replacement Material : ABS Plastic Country/Region of Manufacture : China Other Parts Number : HMDH1026 Items Included : 4X Door Handles Manufacturer Warranty : 1 Year Color : Chrome Fitment1 : 2007-2013 Chevy Silverado Fitment2 : 2007-2014 Chevy Silverado Tahoe Fitment3 : 2007-2013 GMC Sierra 1500 Fitment4 : 2007-2014 GMC Sierra 2500HD 3500HD GMC Yukon Finish : Chrome Attachment Type : Adhesive Payment 1. We accept payment through eBay checkout. Paypal, Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover are all accepted. 2. An invoice will be sent to the primary email address listed on your ebay profile within 24 hours of purchase or end of auction. Shipping 1. Handing time: 1-3 business day after payment has been received. 2. Click the "Shipping and Payments" tab to see shipping costs and estimated delivery dates. If you need an item by a certain date, please contact us prior to purchase for shipping options. 3. Orders will be charged sales tax. 4. Your tracking number will be emailed to you . Returns 1. All items must be applied within 30 days from the date of receive the package for a refund,we accept returns only in 100% NEW ,UNUSED&UNINSTALLED condition; 2. The buyer is responsible for the cost of return shipping; 3. Please contact us for the return Authrization and return address ,do not return items without contact us or your item may be refused and returned to you at your expense. Contact Us 1. Welcome to shop in Geartronics Official Store, We have 8 years'experience on Car parts and Motorcycle parts, with headquarters in Hong Kong and branch offices in Shenzhen(China), Southall(UK), Frankfurt am Main(Germany), Sydney(Australia), Roma(Italy), Paris(France) and Walnut(USA). We own very professional technician and customer service team, till now we have many resellers and drop shippers all over the world. 2. We offer an extensive range of products selected by our professionals.superiority in details and quality is a high priority. We also have a high-standard team, qualified by authorized organizations to ensure products are of the highest quality. 3. We are increasingly expanding international markets based on high quality products, excellent service, reasonable prices and timely delivery. Please contact us at any time for more information.We work hard to make sure EVERY CUSTOMER 100% and ensure products are of the highest quality. Coming Soon All right reserved.
